name: Dividend Yield vs Bond Yield

book_quotes.quote: Figure 10.9 shows that the dividend yield on equities is generally very different from the long bond yield (which was shown to be equalized with the bank prime rate).

The corporate yield is the previously described long bond yield, and the ten-year government bond yield and the dividend yield (calculated as the ratio of dividends to stock prices) are from Shiller (2014) at http://www.econ.yale.edu/~shiller/data.htm, based on his annual long-term data on the S&P composite stock price index from 1871 onward.

primary_source.agency: Robert Shiller / Yale (online dataset); plus Shaikh composite for corporate bond
primary_source.publication: Shiller (2014) 'long-term stock, bond, interest rate, and consumption data since 1871' (update of Market Volatility 1989, ch.26)
primary_source.table_or_series_id: Shiller annual S&P composite: P (price), D (dividend), 10-year govt bond yield (GS10 historical)
primary_source.available_through: Shiller's website (ie_data.xls); also bundled in Shaikh Appendix 10.2

formula: dividend_yield_t = D_t / P_t; gov10y from Shiller historical series; corp_yield = S1002-A composite long bond

concerns: Same source, just updated; clean extension
Modern GS10 starts 1953; pre-1953 already in Shiller
Multpl.com mirrors Shiller's data; direct Shiller preferred

methodology_notes: Three lines on one chart: dividend yield, 10-yr govt bond, corporate long bond.
Dividend yield computed as D/P (not D/P-lagged); follows Shiller convention.
Underlying Shiller series extends back to 1871 for S&P composite; pre-1871 not used.

Footnote 21 (p.468) acknowledges the dividend-bond gap as a 'puzzle' in mainstream finance; Shaikh's classical theory predicts this divergence (equity yields track profit rate, bond yields track bank interest rates).
open_questions: Modern extension via Shiller is trivial; main Phase 4 question is whether to harmonize the corporate yield component (S1002-A) to its modern FRED equivalent for the entire panel.

review_history.notes: CD2 S055 ported; Shiller URL verified per Appendix 10.1; corp yield inherited from S1002
